footer.address: Yalıncak, Deniz 1 Nolu Sk No:5, 61080 Ortahisar/Trabzon

contact.title: We welcome your feedback
contact.subject: Subject
contact.visitText: With its location close to the sea, stylish atmosphere and delicious menu, La Plage awaits guests for both accommodation and a fine dining experience.

aboutPage.subtitle: OUR STORY
aboutPage.title: About Us
aboutPage.text:
Maison La Plage was established in Trabzon to bring together Mediterranean and Italian cuisine with quality ingredients, handmade flavors, and a warm atmosphere.

From handmade pastas and raviolis to stone-baked pizzas, from carefully prepared breakfasts to seafood, we prepare every plate with the same care. Our goal is not just to serve food, but to provide our guests with an experience they will fondly remember.

By bringing together taste, quality, and hospitality, we aim to be one of the new meeting points of Trabzon.
aboutPage.phil1Text: We bring our kitchen to life with the freshest ingredients selected from local markets every morning.
aboutPage.phil2Text: We support eco-friendly production processes and protect the future of our seas.
aboutPage.phil3Text: We present artistic plates by blending Italian culinary traditions with modern techniques.
